referral.description: Just share your code. Your friend gets +10 days on their first subscription, and you get up to 30 days as a bonus.

items.a: Different protocols offer different balances of speed, security, and stability. For example, modern solutions like WireGuard offer high speed and simple architecture, while classic protocols like OpenVPN are known for their reliability and wide support.

items.q: In which countries are your servers available?
items.a: We have servers in many countries around the world. The full list of available locations is available in the app after connecting.

items.q: Do you store user activity logs?
items.a: No, we do not store user activity logs. We adhere to a strict no-logs policy to protect your privacy.

items.q: How secure is a VPN connection?
items.a: Our VPN uses modern encryption to protect your data. All traffic is encrypted before leaving your device, ensuring high security on any network.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept major bank cards, as well as popular payment systems. For a full list of available methods, see the payment page in the app.

downloadPage.heroTitle: No card. No email. No tracking. Just protection.
downloadPage.heroText: Download the app, tap Connect — and you’re protected. We can’t spy on you because we don’t have your data.
downloadPage.mythsTitle: Let’s bust a few VPN myths
downloadPage.mythsP1: People say every VPN is tied to an identity. Raqoon uses an account, but it’s anonymous: no bank card on file and no mandatory email.
downloadPage.mythsP2: We don’t offer a “free with ads” product. You get 3 full days of access, then you pay for the plan you already picked. We focus on protecting traffic—not harvesting your data.
features: 3 full days of access — then pay for your plan
downloadPage.finalTitle: Download now. No signup noise. No email required. Just privacy.
downloadPage.finalText: Join a growing community of people who choose a VPN that isn’t built to track them.

about.keyPointsBody: Qat Bilişim LTD. develops and operates Raqoon digital services. We prioritize process transparency, personal data protection, and high service quality. The company operates in accordance with applicable legal requirements and internal security standards.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Raqoon Privacy Policy
Effective Date: March 1, 2026
Jurisdiction: Ankara, Türkiye
Owner: Qat Bilişim Ltd.

Summary
We respect your right to anonymity and security. We do not see what you do online, we do not log the websites you visit, and we do not store the content of your traffic. Our system only records technical parameters (data volume and the time of your last connection) to ensure connection quality. We do not store your card details — all payments are processed through secure external gateways.

1. Zero Logs Policy
We adhere to a strict no-logs policy regarding your activity. The technical architecture of the Service prevents us from recording, storing, or sharing the following data with third parties:
• Activity History: We do not record visited websites (URLs), search queries, or browsing history.
• Network Queries: We do not keep logs of DNS queries.
• Traffic Content: We do not have access to the content of transmitted data, including messages, emails, or files.
• Original IP Address: We do not store your real IP address while you use the service, nor do we link it to your activity.

2. Data We Collect (Technical Necessity)
To ensure stable operation and manage subscriptions, the Service processes a minimal set of technical data.
2.1. Identification
• UUID / Access Key: A unique technical identifier used to authorize your device on our servers.
• Email (Optional): Used exclusively for account recovery or sending receipts and system notifications.
2.2. Statistics and Diagnostics
• Data Volume: The amount of sent and received data used to monitor your plan's limits.
• Last Connection Time: Recorded to identify connection issues and maintain an accurate session status.
• Subscription Status: The validity period and activity status of your access key.

3. App Functionality and No-Tracking
• Marketing Trackers: Our applications do not contain third-party marketing or analytics tools (such as Facebook SDK or advertising IDs) that could transmit your data to third parties.
• Availability Monitoring: The application may automatically check the connection to our nodes. This data is completely anonymized and used solely to automatically select the fastest server.

4. Payment Information
We do not store or process your full bank card details.
• App Store: Transactions are processed by the Apple App Store. We receive only an encrypted token confirming the fact of payment.

5. Data Retention and Deletion
• Technical Information: Data regarding traffic and login times is stored for the duration of your subscription.
• Automatic Deletion: If you do not renew your subscription, account data may be completely removed from the system after 90 days of inactivity.
• Your Right to Delete: You can completely delete your account and all associated information at any time through the app settings or by contacting support.

6. Data Sharing and Legal Requests
Qat Bilişim Ltd. is registered in Türkiye. We do not sell user data or transfer it to advertising companies. In the event of official requests from law enforcement agencies, we operate strictly within the law. However, our architecture makes it impossible to provide data about your actions online, as this information is technically not recorded. We can only confirm the existence of an account and the total volume of traffic consumed.

7. Contact Us
For questions regarding privacy or data deletion:
• Email: private@raqoon.app
• Telegram: @raqoonbot
• Location: Ankara, Türkiye

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body:
Terms of Use (PUBLIC OFFER)
Effective Date: March 1, 2026
Place of Publication: Ankara, Türkiye
This User Agreement (hereinafter the “Agreement”) is an official offer of the Raqoon service (hereinafter the “Provider” or the “Service”) to enter into a contract with any individual (hereinafter the “User”) under the terms set forth below.

1. GENERAL PROVISIONS
1.1. Use of the Raqoon application, registration on the website, or payment for Service offerings constitutes the User's full and unconditional acceptance of this Agreement (Acceptance).
1.2. The User guarantees that they are at least 18 years old and have full legal capacity to conclude this Agreement.
1.3. The Provider reserves the right to amend the terms of this Agreement. A new version enters into force at the moment of publication.

2. SUBJECT OF THE AGREEMENT
2.1. The Provider grants the User a non-exclusive right (License) to use the Service software and network infrastructure to establish a virtual private network (VPN).
2.2. Access to software:
2.2.1. Access to the Service by default is provided exclusively through the official Raqoon application.
2.2.2. The use of third-party clients (including Hiddify, v2rayNG, and similar tools) is allowed only where such capability is explicitly provided in the description of the Tariff plan purchased by the User.
2.3. Device limit:
2.3.1. The number of simultaneous connections (sessions) is determined by the terms of the selected Tariff plan.
2.3.2. If no limit is specified in the Tariff, the standard limit is 5 (five) devices per account.

3. TERMS OF USE AND PROHIBITIONS
3.1. The User undertakes to use the Service only for lawful purposes.
3.2. Strictly prohibited actions:
3.2.1. Use of P2P protocols (BitTorrent) and torrent downloads on any Service servers.
3.2.2. Spam distribution (including bulk email via port 25), flooding in messengers and social networks.
3.2.3. Distribution of malicious software, viruses, trojans, or botnet control.
3.2.4. Any kind of network attacks: port scanning, password brute-force, DDoS attacks, unauthorized access to third-party resources.
3.2.5. Distribution of child pornography and materials promoting terrorism or violence.
3.3. Consequences of violations: A breach of any clause in section 3.2 results in immediate account suspension without the right to restoration and without refund.

4. FAIR USE POLICY
4.1. The Service is intended for personal, non-commercial use.
4.2. For Tariff plans in the “Unlimited” category, the following restrictions apply:
4.2.1. If consumed traffic exceeds 3 TB (terabytes) per month;
AND
4.2.2. The Service detects abnormal channel load that degrades connection quality for other users;
4.2.3. The Provider reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to limit connection speed or suspend access until the end of the billing period.

5. PAYMENT AND REFUND PROCEDURE
5.1. Service offerings are classified as digital content delivered instantly in electronic form.
5.2. No-refund rule: In accordance with Article 15(ğ) of the Turkish Republic “Regulation on Distance Contracts” (Mesafeli Sözleşmeler Yönetmeliği), the consumer's right of withdrawal (refund) does not apply to services performed instantly in electronic environments.
5.3. App Store payments: Refunds for subscriptions made through Apple App Store are governed exclusively by Apple's rules. The Provider has no technical ability to process such refunds.
5.4. Blocking of access to the Service caused by actions of government authorities (internet censorship) or the User's internet providers is recognized as force majeure and is not a basis for refund.

6. LIABILITY OF THE PARTIES
6.1. The Service is provided on an “as is” basis. The Provider does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation of the Service, nor compatibility with networks of specific internet providers.
6.2. The Provider is not liable for any damages, including lost profits, arising from use of or inability to use the Service.

7. FINAL PROVISIONS
7.1. This Agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of Türkiye.
7.2. All disputes and disagreements shall be resolved in the courts of Ankara, Türkiye.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any questions regarding service operation, access, billing, or support, contact us at hello@raqoon.app. We aim to respond as quickly as possible.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.body:
Refund Policy
Effective Date: March 1, 2026

If a subscription is purchased through the App Store, refunds, subscription cancellations, and all related matters are governed by App Store rules and procedures.

For payment-related questions, contact support at hello@raqoon.app.
